title: CPvP Gray 16x
description:
It's basically a Minecraft CPvP or General PvP Texture pack that's gray
-gray items
-gray blocks and black
-no blast particle
-low fire
-gray and black gui
body:
It's a CPVP pack thats black, gray and white and you can also use it for gamemodes like UHC, Sword, Axe, Neth Pot and other gamemodes.

-gray items,  
-gray blocks and black,  
-no blast particle,  
-low fire (which is gray),  
-gray and black gui,  
-small totem pops,  
-gray diamond armor,  
-gray items.
